summary: Bug Fix Verified: TSRID Asset Modal CSS rendering issue fixed - Modal now displays all content correctly after changing DialogContent from 'grid' to 'flex flex-col'
critical_code_review_comments: CSS fix applied correctly in dialog.jsx line 37: changed from 'grid' to 'flex flex-col'
This fix ensures inner grid elements (grid-cols-2) render with proper height
All modal sections now display: Identifikation, Produkt & Technische Daten, Kaufdaten & Garantie, Label-Vorschau
seed_data_creation: Used existing asset TSRID-TAB-i7-0001 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: TSRID Asset Modal bug is fixed. Test flow: Portal Login -> Global Search 'TSRID-TAB-i7-0001' -> Modal auto-opens with all content visible

global_search_tsrid_asset.description: Search for TSRID-TAB-i7-0001 opens modal with asset details

bug_fix_verification.issue: TSRID Asset modal showed empty content when opened from global search
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: CSS layout bug in dialog.jsx - 'grid' display caused inner grid-cols-2 elements to have 0 height
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed DialogContent className from 'grid' to 'flex flex-col' in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/dialog.jsx
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: All 11/11 modal content elements now visible and functional
